title: ZERO.4 Q2.6-R seed-1 replay-tangent replication
hypothesis: The accepted Q2.6 global replay-tangent intervention reproduces on seed 1 under unchanged public, promotion, and replay authorities.
rationale: Seed 2 passed strongly, but a family claim requires seeds 1, 2, and 3 all to pass. This experiment changes only the declared training seed and forbids adaptive repair or early family stopping.

metrics.name: replication_seed
metrics.description: Authorized Q2.6-R seed identity.

metrics.name: seed_passed
metrics.description: Conjunctive upstream public and promotion decision, encoded as 0 or 1.

metrics.name: optimizer_attempts
metrics.description: Total outer transactional AdamW attempts evaluated.

metrics.name: committed_updates
metrics.description: Outer attempts committed after tangent construction and cumulative replay authority.

metrics.name: rejected_outer_attempts
metrics.description: Outer attempts rolled back after exhausting all eight projected scales.

metrics.name: full_scale_commits
metrics.description: Commits accepted at the unscaled learning rate.

metrics.name: backtracked_commits
metrics.description: Commits accepted after one or more geometric retries.

metrics.name: trial_evaluations
metrics.description: Total projected or unprojected candidate scales evaluated.

metrics.name: max_trials_used
metrics.description: Largest trial count observed in one outer attempt.

metrics.name: min_accepted_scale
metrics.description: Smallest learning-rate scale committed, or zero if no attempt commits.

metrics.name: warning_trial_exceedances
metrics.description: Trials above 1% cumulative replay increase or non-finite.

metrics.name: hard_trial_exceedances
metrics.description: Trials above 1.5% cumulative replay increase or non-finite.

metrics.name: max_trial_replay_increase
metrics.description: Largest finite trial composite increase relative to immutable ZERO.3.

metrics.name: max_committed_replay_increase
metrics.description: Largest finite committed composite increase relative to immutable ZERO.3.

metrics.name: projected_trials
metrics.description: Trials whose replay-increasing displacement component was removed.

metrics.name: projected_commits
metrics.description: Committed attempts whose selected trial applied projection.

metrics.name: unprojected_trials
metrics.description: Trials left unchanged because their replay-gradient dot displacement was non-positive.

metrics.name: max_projection_removed_fraction
metrics.description: Largest fraction of candidate displacement norm removed by projection.

metrics.name: mean_projection_removed_fraction
metrics.description: Mean removed displacement fraction over projected trials.

metrics.name: max_projection_pre_dot
metrics.description: Largest positive replay-gradient dot displacement before projection.

metrics.name: max_absolute_projection_post_dot
metrics.description: Largest absolute replay-gradient dot projected displacement after projection.

metrics.name: public_checkpoint_count
metrics.description: Frozen full public evaluations completed.

metrics.name: jointly_feasible_checkpoint_count
metrics.description: Public checkpoints satisfying quantity and replay gates together.

metrics.name: promotion_evaluations
metrics.description: Disjoint promotion evaluations performed.

outcomes.description: The frozen public checkpoint and exactly-once promotion gates all pass.
Execution completes validly without the public-and-promotion conjunction.
The process exits unsuccessfully, times out, duplicates a result, or violates the metric envelope.
